notes: SKDocument.CreateXps() requires the Windows XPS backend (guarded by #ifdef SK_BUILD_FOR_WIN in Skia). On macOS, SkXPS::MakeDocument returns nullptr, so CreateXps() returns null. Docker cannot help because XPS requires Windows COM APIs (IXpsOMObjectFactory). The bug — incorrect image scaling in XPS output — can only be reproduced on Windows. PDF creation works correctly on macOS, validating the repro code is sound.

reproductionSteps.description: Create console repro project with SkiaSharp 3.116.1 and Svg.Skia 3.2.1
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net9.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.1 && dotnet add package Svg.Skia --version 3.2.1
reproductionSteps.output:
The template "Console App" was created successfully.
PackageReference for package 'SkiaSharp' version '3.116.1' added.
PackageReference for package 'Svg.Skia' version '3.2.1' added.

reproductionSteps.description: Write repro code: generate SVG with embedded image, attempt CreateXps() and CreatePdf()
reproductionSteps.command: cat > Program.cs (repro code based on reporter's code)

filesCreated.description: Console app that creates an SVG with an embedded base64 PNG image, then attempts to generate both PDF and XPS output using SKDocument.CreatePdf() and SKDocument.CreateXps()

reproductionSteps.description: Run repro — PDF works, XPS returns null on macOS (XPS backend is Windows-only)
reproductionSteps.output:
Generated base64 image, length=132
SVG bounds: 265x189
Page size: 198.75x141.75, contentScale=0.75

--- Testing PDF ---
PDF created successfully, size=204800 bytes

--- Testing XPS ---
CreateXps returned null (XPS backend not available on this platform)

SUCCESS: test completed

reproductionSteps.description: Repeat with SkiaSharp 3.119.1 (latest) — same result, XPS returns null on macOS
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.119.1 && dotnet run
reproductionSteps.output:
--- Testing PDF ---
PDF created successfully, size=204800 bytes
--- Testing XPS ---
CreateXps returned null (XPS backend not available on this platform)
SUCCESS: test completed

reproductionSteps.description: Verified Skia source: SkXPSDocument.h guards MakeDocument with #ifdef SK_BUILD_FOR_WIN, returns nullptr on non-Windows

blockers: XPS backend requires Windows — SkXPS::MakeDocument is guarded by #ifdef SK_BUILD_FOR_WIN and returns nullptr on macOS/Linux
Docker cannot help because XPS depends on Windows COM APIs (IXpsOMObjectFactory), not available in Linux containers
The reported bug is about visual image scaling in XPS output, which requires the Windows XPS rendering pipeline to test

versionResults.notes: CreateXps() returns null on macOS — XPS backend is Windows-only
CreateXps() returns null on macOS — XPS backend is Windows-only

corrections.upstream: Triage classified as needs-investigation without noting platform requirement
corrections.corrected: Bug requires Windows platform for reproduction — XPS backend is compile-time guarded for Windows only
